dialogueChunks.intro: Two of our most respected figures are at each other's throats. {quest_ally} and {target_npc} both believe they should lead the settlement's next expansion, and neither will yield.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Both have their supporters, and {quest_focus} has split the community down the middle. The {enemy_type} have taken note of our distraction: raids are increasing near {location_hint} while we bicker.
dialogueChunks.outro: Someone outside the dispute needs to act while our leaders compete. {player_name}, will you handle the real threats while we sort out {quest_stakes}?

playerResponses.text: I'll handle what matters while they argue.
Maybe I can help settle this too.

dialogueChunks.intro: Two of our artisans have been feuding for months over who's the superior craftsperson. It's gotten so bad that {quest_ally} refuses to work on the same projects as {target_npc}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Both claim they can produce better {quest_item} than the other, and they've dragged the whole settlement into their rivalry. Now they've proposed a challenge: whoever provides the better raw materials wins {quest_focus}. Both are looking for outside help.
dialogueChunks.outro: It's petty, but it's disrupting everything. {player_name}, if you gather the materials they need, we might end {quest_threat} and get our artisans cooperating again.

playerResponses.text: Craftspeople and their egos. Fine, I'll help.
Let them sort out their own squabble.

dialogueChunks.intro: {quest_ally} challenged {target_npc} to a contest: who can clear more {enemy_type} from the land around {location_hint}. What started as bravado has become dangerously reckless.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Both are taking bigger risks to outdo the other, venturing deeper into hostile territory near {location}. {quest_focus} has become less about protecting the settlement and more about pride. Someone is going to get killed.
dialogueChunks.outro: I need someone out there who can actually thin the {enemy_type} numbers while keeping those two from getting themselves killed. {player_name}, are you up for it?

playerResponses.text: I'll show them both how it's done.
Someone has to be the responsible one.
Let them learn the hard way.
